title.v: cập nhật đánh giá thực hiện công việc

items.key: (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

items.key: (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

header.v: Ý kiến quản lý trực tiếp
Ý kiến quản lý cấp cao

command.text:
select rtrim(a.ma_nv_dg) as ma_nv_dg, a.ten, rtrim(a.ma_nv) as ma_nv , a.ten2, b.ten_bac%l as bac_quan_ly, a.ngay_vao_cty, c.ten_bp%l, d.ten_vtr%l , round(isnull(dbo.FastBusiness$Function$Different$Year(a.ngay_vao_cty, a.ngay_dg), 0), 2) as nam_lv , round(isnull(dbo.FastBusiness$Function$Different$Year(a.ngay_chinh_thuc, a.ngay_dg), 0), 2) as nam_cv , stt_rec_nv as stt_rec_nv_old, ma_ky as ma_ky_old, nam as nam_old , convert(varchar(19), a.datetime2, 121) as cookie from ( select z.stt_rec, w.ma_nv, rtrim(w.ho_nv) + space(1) + w.ten_nv as ten2, w.ngay_vao as ngay_vao_cty, z.ngay_dg, isnull(x.bac_quan_ly, w.bac_quan_ly) as bac_quan_ly, isnull(x.bo_phan, w.bo_phan) as ma_bp, isnull(x.vi_tri, w.vi_tri) as ma_vtr, isnull(x.ngay_tu, w.ngay_chinh_thuc) as ngay_chinh_thuc, v.ma_nv as ma_nv_dg, rtrim(v.ho_nv) + space(1) + v.ten_nv as ten, z.stt_rec_nv, z.ma_ky, z.nam, z.datetime2 from hrdgth z left join hreqtlvht x on z.stt_rec_nv = x.stt_rec and x.tinh_chat = '1' and x.ngay_tu = (select max(y.ngay_tu) from hreqtlvht y where y.stt_rec = z.stt_rec_nv and y.ngay_tu <= z.ngay_dg and y.tinh_chat = 1) left join hrnv w on z.stt_rec_nv = w.stt_rec left join hrnv v on z.stt_rec_ndg = v.stt_rec where z.stt_rec = @stt_rec ) a left join hrdmbql b on a.bac_quan_ly = b.ma_bac left join hrbp c on a.ma_bp = c.ma_bp left join hrvt d on a.ma_vtr = d.ma_vtr
return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$checkPeriod nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Kỳ đánh giá %s1, năm đánh giá %s2 và nhân viên %s3 đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong cập nhật đánh giá thực hiện công việc.' else N'The record consisting of appraisal period %s1, year of appraisal %s2 and appraisee %s3 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Kỳ đánh giá %s1, năm đánh giá %s2 và nhân viên %s3 đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record consisting of appraisal period %s1, year of appraisal %s2 and appraisee %s3 has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$checkPeriod = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Trường Kỳ đánh giá chưa nhập hoặc giá trị nhập không hợp lệ.' else N'Field Appraisal Period must not be blank or has invalid value.' end

if not exists(select 1 from hrdmkydg where ma_ky = @ma_ky) begin select 'ma_ky' as field, @$checkPeriod as message return end
if exists(select * from @@table where ma_ky = @ma_ky and nam = @nam and stt_rec_nv = @stt_rec_nv) begin select 'ma_ky' as field, replace(replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_ky)), '%s2', rtrim(@nam)), '%s3', rtrim(@$ma_nv)) as message return end
declare @wsID varchar(8) select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where upper(name) = 'M_WS_ID' select @stt_rec = max(stt_rec) from @@table select @stt_rec = @wsID + case when @stt_rec is null then '000000001' else replace(str(cast(substring(@stt_rec, 2, 9) as bigint) + 1, 9), ' ', '0') end + 'HDG' select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID
update @d01 set stt_rec = @stt_rec
insert into hrdgthct select * from @d01 select @stt_rec as stt_rec

if not exists(select 1 from hrdmkydg where ma_ky = @ma_ky) begin select 'ma_ky' as field, @$checkPeriod as message return end
if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_ky = @$ma_ky_old and nam = @$nam_old and stt_rec_nv = @$stt_rec_nv_old) begin select 'ma_ky' as field, replace(replace(replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s1', rtrim(@$ma_ky_old)), '%s2', rtrim(@$nam_old)), '%s3', rtrim(@$ma_nv)) as message return end
if @ma_ky <> @$ma_ky_old or @nam <> @$nam_old or @stt_rec_nv <> @$stt_rec_nv_old begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (ma_ky = @$ma_ky_old and nam = @$nam_old and stt_rec_nv = @$stt_rec_nv_old)) and (ma_ky = @ma_ky and nam = @nam and stt_rec_nv = @stt_rec_nv)) begin select 'ma_ky' as field, replace(replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_ky)), '%s2', rtrim(@nam)), '%s3', rtrim(@$ma_nv)) as message return end end

if $d01.NewValue <> $d01.OldValue begin update @d01 set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrdgthct where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrdgthct select * from @d01 end update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec

action.text:
if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin declare @parentID varchar(32), @parentCode varchar(32), @parentName nvarchar(128) select @parentCode = rtrim(nv_ql) from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv if @parentCode <> '' select @parentID = rtrim(stt_rec), @parentName = rtrim(ho_nv) + space(1) + ten_nv from hrnv where ma_nv = @parentCode select @parentID = isnull(@parentID, ''), @parentCode = isnull(@parentCode, ''), @parentName = isnull(@parentName, '')
select a.stt_rec, rtrim(d.ten_bp%l) as ten_bp, rtrim(isnull(e.ten_vtr%l, '')) as ten_vtr, rtrim(isnull(f.ten_bac%l, '')) as ten_bac, a.ngay_vao, round(isnull(dbo.FastBusiness$Function$Different$Year(a.ngay_vao, @ngay_dg), 0), 2) as nam_lv, round(isnull(dbo.FastBusiness$Function$Different$Year(a.ngay_chinh_thuc, @ngay_dg), 0), 2) as nam_cv, @parentID as stt_rec_ndg, @parentCode as ma_nv_dg, @parentName as ten_nv_dg from ( select a.stt_rec, isnull(b.bo_phan, a.bo_phan) as bo_phan, isnull(b.vi_tri, a.vi_tri) as vi_tri, isnull(b.bac_quan_ly, a.bac_quan_ly) as bac_quan_ly, isnull(b.ngay_tu, a.ngay_chinh_thuc) as ngay_chinh_thuc, a.ngay_vao from hrnv a left join hreqtlvht b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and b.tinh_chat = '1' and ngay_tu = ((select max(c.ngay_tu) from hreqtlvht c where c.stt_rec = a.stt_rec and c.ngay_tu <= @ngay_dg and c.tinh_chat = 1)) where a.ma_nv = @ma_nv) a left join hrbp d on a.bo_phan = d.ma_bp left join hrvt e on a.vi_tri = e.ma_vtr left join hrdmbql f on a.bac_quan_ly = f.ma_bac end else select '', '', '', '', '', '', null, 0, 0, '', '', '' return
if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) select stt_rec from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv else select '' return
